reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Best college of Karnataka to pursue pharmacy courses.

review_content.Placements: There are lot of opportunities provided by various Pharma companies and handsome packages are also given too. Other than getting jobs in Pharma companies we can also get government jobs such as drug controller and drug inspector by cracking the entrance exams.
review_content.Infrastructure: Best environment to build up our career. There is a hostel facility for both boys and girls separately. Good food has been provided. Along with studies many cultural activities and sports are also been conducted every year. It focuses on student's overall development.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a pride to be a student of this college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of the students got placed. M.Pharma seats are limited in any college and especially in government colleges. There were 8 students previously, and now it is increased to 15. All these students get placed in reputed organisations by the end of their curriculum. The highest salary package offered by Deloitte was 4.8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was around 2.25 LPA. GCP students are placed in companies like IQvia as clinical data manager, Novo Nordisk as drug safety assistant, Syngene as research assistants, Labcorp, Cognizant, etc. Companies that have come here in the past are Iqvia, Syngene, etc. This year Micro Labs is also coming. Top roles in our course are clinical research associate, clinical data management, teaching, pharmacovigilance field, etc. GCP also offers PhD programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am proud and grateful to be a part of this college. It has a great infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college basically gives admission to students who have 80% of marks and above in their previous courses. Our college provides job security, which I think is the best thing for students. Companies show interest in the college and its students. The top recruiting companies for the courses offered in our college are plenty which includes Cipla, AstraZeneca, Dr. Reddy's, etc. Almost every student in our college got their internships followed by better jobs every academic year until now. It is the best college for the courses of pharmacy education in Bangalore, Karnataka.

faqs.answer: A:    GMERS Medical College and Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. GMERS Medical College and Hospital has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Dermatology, Microbiology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, Pathology, Psychiatry.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at GMERS Medical College and Hospital?

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at GMERS Medical College and Hospital goes up to 244. Courses offerred by GMERS Medical College and Hospital are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NMC.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at GMERS Medical College and Hospital for all courses together?

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good choice for MBBS because it is value for money and well-reputed.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students in our college got placed as a doctor in government hospitals as a debt for bond. The highest package offered is approximately 60,000 to 90,000 per month in government hospitals, and approximately 1-1.25 Lacs in private hospitals. The top recruitment is done by government hospitals majorly. We are offered the role of medical officer (MO) in hospitals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college building is decently big, very good and confusing for newcomers. There are 4 lifts in the building, out of which a maximum of 2 are seen running at a time. Gallery classrooms are available. AC works fine, and the benches are decent. Projector facilities are good. The reading room is very good, huge and motivating. The library is open from 9 am-5 pm. Very good seating arrangements are done, and various types of books are available. The hostel rooms are very bad, and they are of low sanity and barely cleaned. Hostel lifts are often not working, and hence, we have to use the staircase. The hostel building is 10-storeyed. The food in mess is utterly foul. Most of the students order tiffin from outside for their meals. The college doesn't provide any sports facilities, but the students union have developed very good sport facilities and have regulated the ground of cricket, football etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is very good, hygiene is maintained here very well.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and college.

content.Placements: This is an MBBS college. It is present in Ahmedabad. It provides a stipend during internships of Rs. 20,000. After completion MBBS, you can pursue a post-graduation or junior president in any college. You can become a medical officer in any public health care under the government.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is present in this college. It has an attached hospital. There are high-quality classrooms. The hostel is near to college and has CCTV surveillance on every floor. A sports ground is present in college for cricket, football, basketball, etc. There is a badminton court. The mess gives the best quality food.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Campus is small but crowd is great.

content.Placements: Each batch consists of 200 students who get admitted after clearing NEET-UG. Many students from our college give exams like USMLE and PLAB apart from NEET PG. In university exams ( Gujarat University ), GMERS Solar perform better compared to other GMERS.
content.Infrastructure: The college and hostels are currently being renovated. The walls have been painted and the washrooms are being replaced. The lecture halls are decent and the corridors are cleaned everyday but washrooms need work. We have museums, dissection halls, labs auditoriums, etc., necessary for MBBS course. We even have a connection bridge that connect the college to hospital. There is a dedicated floor for library and 3 reading rooms where students study. There is boys and girls hostel, each of 10 floors. Each floor had a common room where you can study or do anything recreational. There are 2 elevator which sometimes stop working but they are quickly repaired. The rooms are good and have no balcony. There are 3 canteens in total in the campus, one college canteen and two hospital canteens plus a juice shop. We have regular mess (except sunday evening) in boys and girls hostels. The canteen and mess are vegetarian. The mess serves better hygienic food. The prices are affordable. The campus is small. The campus has a football field where cricket and volleyball is played. Badminton and basketball court is also available. Students get priority and free treatment in hospital. There are two pharmacies. There is good amount of parking space. The roads have reflects and the buildings are well marked. Things that our college lacks is no Wi-Fi. There is no bank, stationary, or printout facilities in the campus. However, these are available very near the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good choice for MBBS because it is value for money and well-reputed.

content.Placements: Almost all the students in our college got placed as a doctor in government hospitals as a debt for bond. The highest package offered is approximately 60,000 to 90,000 per month in government hospitals, and approximately 1-1.25 Lacs in private hospitals. The top recruitment is done by government hospitals majorly. We are offered the role of medical officer (MO) in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is decently big, very good and confusing for newcomers. There are 4 lifts in the building, out of which a maximum of 2 are seen running at a time. Gallery classrooms are available. AC works fine, and the benches are decent. Projector facilities are good. The reading room is very good, huge and motivating. The library is open from 9 am-5 pm. Very good seating arrangements are done, and various types of books are available. The hostel rooms are very bad, and they are of low sanity and barely cleaned. Hostel lifts are often not working, and hence, we have to use the staircase. The hostel building is 10-storeyed. The food in mess is utterly foul. Most of the students order tiffin from outside for their meals. The college doesn't provide any sports facilities, but the students union have developed very good sport facilities and have regulated the ground of cricket, football etc.

reviews.review_heading: GMERS Sola - An institution with immense potential for improvement and growth of students itself.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good, not bad, sustainable, and should improve over an upcoming period of time. Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth provides BTech and BSc as popular programmes at the UG level. faqs.question: Can I join Lingaya Vidyapeeth MBA without an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The following is the fees structure for MBA at Lingaya's Vidyapeeth:-MBA in finance:-  The total tution fees for this course is 1.92 L. MBA in international business:- The total tuition fees for this course is 1.92 L.BBA+ MBA integrated:- The total tuition fees for this course is 6.12 L. MBA in Human resource management:- The total tution fees for this course is 1.92 L. MBA in foreign business:- The total tution fees for this course is 3.72 L. MBA in marketing :- The total tution fees for this course is 1.92 L. The students can also get some relief by applying for the scholarships which are provided to meritorious students and the scholarship is also provided through Lingaya's Vidyapeeth scholarship eligibility test.
faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at Lingaya's Vidyapeeth?

faqs.answer: A:    The following is the selection process for BTech at Lingaya's Vidyapeeth:-First of all students have to fill the application form from the Institute' official website with all necessary details like 12 th marks, entrance exam marks etc. along with the payment of application fees. After all the applications, the Institute will release a cut off based on the applications and seat intake. On the basis of that cut off students will be selected. After selection of students, final admission steps like counselling, fee payment etc. will take place and final admission will be given. The minimum JEE score required to take admission will depend upon the cut off. The overall cutoff for general category in 2022 JEE-Main was 189846 - 607387.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for B.Tech and what is the minimum JEE score required?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can join Lingaya's Vidyapeeth without CUET. The university accepts other entrance exams as well, such as JEE Main, CBSE 12th, and HBSE 12th and the university also has its own entrance exam, the Lingaya's Entrance Test (LET).

Food is good, medical facilities are good, and all sports games are played both in the college campus and outside the campus for competitions..

review_summary.college_name: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best colleges in NCR. If you want the best infrastructure, this college is very good for you.

content.Placements: Lingayas Vidyapeeth is a top-ranked college. Their placement cell and placement structure are very good. They give assurance to their students about placement. They provide 100% placement to their students from medium to top companies with a high package of 50 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very nice, like a dream college. They have aesthetic views and provide nice facilities to their students. They have an AC classroom, nice branches, brand corners for the cafeteria. Along with an advanced library, and a big auditorium for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is very good, the campus is quite big, and the faculty are supportive.

content.Placements: I am a student of B Pharmacy 4th year, and placement rate of students is about 60%- 65% and minimun package is 1.5 LPA. The companies are Monique, Mankind and so on. I have learned many things, like GMP, GLP, and many more. Good laboratory practice.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is quite big, good and clean, and cold water is available, and rooms have wardrobes and beds of good quality. Also, the electricity is available all the time. Warden is also very supportive.
content.Faculty: Teacher are very good and qualified, and the minimum qualification of teacher is about Ph.D. and a Master's. The curriculum is very good and they make a well-qualified student, which is ready to move into the industry. I have done my internship from Monique pharmaceutical, which is sponsored by college. Faculty members are very supportive, and they help with studies, and they are highly qualified.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Very satisfied, it gives us good placement, infrastructure, and the faculty is good.

content.Placements: I am from B.Pharma passing year 2026 batch. Around 70 to 75% students are placed with an average package of around 3 to 3.5 LPA. Recruiters like Brown Laboratories, Monique Pharmaceuticals, and similar industries come for placement in the college. The students are good and have a friendly nature.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good, whether it is infrastructure, classroom, hostel room, Wi-Fi, or lab everything is good, the quality of hostel rooms is very good, they are spacious and always clean. Food is good, medical facilities are good, and all sports games are played both in the college campus and outside the campus for competitions..

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides all types of support to the students.

content.Placements: 30% of students are placed in the college course, with the highest package offered being 6 LPA and the lowest package 2 LPA. Additionally, 40% of students got internships from the college in companies like Mankind, Brown Laboratories, etc., in Research and Development (R&D).
content.Infrastructure: We do have a lab with proper managing staff and a lab attendant. We do have smart boards in our classes and a separate departmental library in our pharmacy department. The hostels are in very good condition, and the wardens of both hostels are very supportive and treat all the students as their own children.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college Infrastructure and water facilities are good.

content.Placements: 70% of students are placed, the highest package is 4.2 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.40 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Brawn Laboratories, Unimax, Monique, Sarvodaya Hospital, Amrita Hospital, and Apollo Hospital. Brawn Laboratories recruited 30%, Unimax 20%, Monique 20%, and others 30%. Students joined as pharmacists.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped, neat, and have good facilities. Infrastructure is also good, clean, and full of ventilation with A.C., fans, and windows. A digital library is also available for some books. Wi-Fi is available in each department and hostel for students and teachers.

paragraphs: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth admissionsare based on merit and entrance exam scores. The admission process at Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth is as follows:
STEP 1: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Registration & Application Process

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website of Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth (www.lingayasvidyapeeth.edu.in). Candidates should meet the eligibility criteria set by the university.
STEP 2: Shortlisting by the Admission Committee
Candidates are selected based on merit and university-level entrance exam scores.
STEP 3: Selection Process
Shortlisted candidates must appear for GD-PI + WAT.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are further called for document verification. Post document verification, students must pay the fee to confirm the admission.

placement_data.title: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth has a placement cell that offers placement assistance to all of its students. Resume writing workshops, GD sessions, mock interviews, and other skill-building workshops are organized to train and enlighten students in numerous domains and also to develop their soft skills.

Recently, the institute has concluded the placements for the batch that passed out in 2025. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth placements 2025 stood at INR 15 LPA . A total of 1100 students participated in the placement session 2025, of which 650 students were placed in reputed companies. The top recruiters of Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth in 2025 included Accenture, WNS, HCL , Wipro, Genpact, Infosys, Meesho , Adani, Capgemini, Jaro Education, Square Yards , Accenture, Protiviti, Cvent, Sarvodhya Hospital, Escorts Kubota , etc

hygienic and nourishing food. Besides the cafeterias, there are fast food vegetarian / non-vegetarian joints, Juice corners and a Nestle Counter.

hostel.description: The University has excellent air-conditioned / non-airconditioned on campus hostel facility for boys and girls with comfortable boarding and lodging. The hostel is well equipped with facilities like gym, library and Internet facility through Wi-Fi etc. A small and beautiful swimming pool is in place at the boys hostel.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball

facilities: Specialized and separate labs for each department
labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Specialized and separate labs for each department

reviews.review_heading: The best colleges in NCR. If you want the best infrastructure, this college is very good for you.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very nice, like a dream college. They have aesthetic views and provide nice facilities to their students. They have an AC classroom, nice branches, brand corners for the cafeteria. Along with an advanced library, and a big auditorium for students.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good, the campus is quite big, and the faculty are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is quite big, good and clean, and cold water is available, and rooms have wardrobes and beds of good quality. Also, the electricity is available all the time. Warden is also very supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied, it gives us good placement, infrastructure, and the faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good, whether it is infrastructure, classroom, hostel room, Wi-Fi, or lab everything is good, the quality of hostel rooms is very good, they are spacious and always clean. Food is good, medical facilities are good, and all sports games are played both in the college campus and outside the campus for competitions..

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides all types of support to the students.
reviews.review_text: We do have a lab with proper managing staff and a lab attendant. We do have smart boards in our classes and a separate departmental library in our pharmacy department. The hostels are in very good condition, and the wardens of both hostels are very supportive and treat all the students as their own children.

reviews.review_heading: Our college Infrastructure and water facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped, neat, and have good facilities. Infrastructure is also good, clean, and full of ventilation with A.C., fans, and windows. A digital library is also available for some books. Wi-Fi is available in each department and hostel for students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of good faculty, placement, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth is a very good college, and the facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. The college contains various departments like Pharmacy, Law, Nursing, etc. The classes are also very good, the labs are smart, and the library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very time-restricted, students are not allowed to go outside the college before 3 pm.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-equipped, neat, and have good facilities. Infrastructure is also good, clean, and full of ventilation with AC, fans, and windows. A digital library is also available but only for some books. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel for students. Games and sports encourage students towards competition.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy to have gotten admission in Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth.
reviews.review_text: Our B.Pharma department has fully equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a rich library, hostel facilities are clean, with good food in the mess and canteen. Medical support, sports, and games are well-maintained and easily accessible. I am very happy.

reviews.review_heading: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for both the college and the hostel is living worthy. Cleaning is done according to the timetable regularly by the cleaning staff. A little development at some what part may be needed, but overall, the building, rooms, classes, and whole infrastructure are above average.

reviews.review_heading: College is great. The faculty are nice.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are nice and good. Labs are always available for students. Labs are in good condition, and all the instruments, chemicals and glassware are available for students. Chemicals are of good quality and condition, and the instruments are of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for all the students.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is not available. State scholarship is not available in this college. 
Labs are good. Classroom is not very good. No AC in any classroom, 
if there is any, they will not be working. Teachers are very supportive and helpful, especially the sports teacher. The ground is very good. Academic activity is regularly done. Good senior behaviour.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Faridabad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college and each department of education are the best at their level, as they are properly ventilated and built. The facilities in the hostel and mess are also nice, and the quality of food served in the canteen is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The best college I found for my higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The first thing I loved in my college was the infrastructure. The buildings and the green around the college are so good. Infrastructure is so amazing, I love my college, it was so good I can see my future bright. A blessed teacher, the best mentor to support.

reviews.review_heading: College is an okay environment, okay crowd. Here, it's not good, but the facility is nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good. There are no ACs in the classroom. The lab seating arrangement is not good. The class is so crowded that I wanted to change the seating arrangement, and also the classroom cleanliness. The seats are so comfortable, and kindly look into this problem, there is no Wi-Fi in the classroom or lab.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for only the pharmacy in Faridabad under a good budget, but not for other courses.
reviews.review_text: Very old buildings and bad flooring, ceiling and wall materials. Titles are getting broken at many places in college. Also, a few water coolers are working, others are in the worst condition. AC doesn't work either, only in the Offices of the facility. Don't get fooled by AC at exception.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Lingaya’s Vidyapeeth

likes.text: Top recruitment companies like Apple, Infosys, Huawei, Zomato, and many more companies visit the campus.
The students have to do hard work while training and clear the interviews for getting good and higher packages from the companies.

paragraphs: Lingaya's Vidyapeeth is a private deemed-to-be university located in Faridabad. The total tuition fee for an MBA in Finance is INR 1.92 lakh. Lingayas Institute of Management and Technology MBA in Human Resource fee structure is INR 1.92 lakh and the accommodation is around 50,000 finally for one year they will charge around 1.5 lakhs based on campus location there are slight changes in the amount.
The total tuition fee for the BA course at Lingaya's Vidyapeeth is INR 57,000. To know the tuition fee in detail for this course, candidates can visit the official website.

The total tuition fee for the MBA course at Lingaya Vidyapeeth ranges between INR 1.9 lakh-INR 6.1 lakh. Candidates may also have to pay the other fee components, such as exam fee, registration fee, etc. The tuition fee may vary further.

college_info.intro:
PDM University comprises more than 10 departments, including Agriculture, Allied Health Sciences, Commerce & Management Studies, Dental Sciences, Engineering, and others. The affiliated colleges and departments of the university offer a wide range of courses at the UG, PG, diploma, and PhD levels, across various streams. MBA, BDS, and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
PDM University offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The MBA programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Marketing Management, Finance, International Business, Organisational Behaviour and Human Resource. The BTech programme offered by the PDM University is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Computer Science & IT, Electronics & Communication Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. The university accepts lateral entry for BTech students.
Below-mentioned are PDM University's popular programmes:

faqs.question: How are the placements for BDS in PDM University?

faqs.answer: A:    No one cannot take direct admission in PDM University. So as soon as the application forms are out, one can apply online on the university's website. Online application form includes personal details, educational qualifications and basic registration fees. Admission to all the courses is merit-based except for MDS, BDS, BTech, MPharm and MBA courses. Students have to give a common entrance test for the above mention courses like JEE Mains, NEET UG CMAT etc. Final admission to all the courses is depends on counselling session for the shortlisted candidates.
faqs.question: Can I join PDM University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    As of now, there is no official information available on PDM University's seat reservation policy. However, as per the university's official website, there are 100 seats reserved for the BPharma programme. Interested applicants can get in touch with the university's admission officials for verified information. However, the above-mentioned seat is taken from the official website. It is subject to change and hence, inductive.
faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy followed at PDM University?

faqs.answer: A:    Master of business administration (MBA) is a 2 year post graduation course. The two most important entrance exams to take admission for MBA in any university are CAT and CMAT. CAT exam is specification taken to get admission in IIMs only, where as CMAT exam is taken to get admission in MBA in any private UniversityThe eligibility criteria for MBA includes Bachelor’s or Post-graduate Degree in any discipline with a minimum of 55% marks in aggregate from a recognised University or an examination recognised as equivalent. The CAT cut off usually goes up to 90-99% in order to get admission in IIMs. For other universities, CMAT cut off goes as low as 25%>Final admission depends on the counselling session conducted for the shortlisted candidates.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA and what is the minimum CMAT percentile required?

reviews_list.review_title: It is good for studying but not for hostels and meals.

review_content.Placements: There haven't been many placement opportunities, as no companies have come to the university to hire students. Many students come from poor families and are eager for placements, but unfortunately, there are none available. Throughout my entire course, I hardly heard the word "placement." While the academic aspect of the program is strong, the placement opportunities are lacking.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is good. University have their own Wi-Fi but it can't work properly in other words Wi-Fi is not for students. Wi-Fi is for teachers and staff members. Hostels are NIT really good in a campaign of other hostels means another college hostels. Study is best in this college but not have any placement in pharmacy.

reviews_list.review_title: College was good but degree.

review_content.Placements: PDM University College of Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana: 60% of students are placed. The highest average package was 6 Lacs, and the lowest was 3 Lacs. Tata, Maruti, Toyota, and Galaxy are some of the top recruiters. 50% of students got internships from our course. Companies will be chosen by students.
review_content.Infrastructure: PDM University College of Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana has very good facilities and infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, washrooms, admin block, lifts, windows, AC, etc.
review_content.Faculty: Yes, teachers were helpful many times. All teachers were qualified, and some teachers are also from PDM University of Mechanical Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana. All teachers are knowledgeable, and the teaching is very good. Yes, it's very hard (50%).

review_summary.college_name: PDM University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would not recommend joining this college.

content.Placements: There are no placement opportunities due to the lack of facilities and poor condition of the college. Around 2020, companies like TCS, Wipro, etc., used to visit, but now there are no placements at the university. You have to do everything on your own, without relying on any teachers.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure is so bad. Most of the buildings are dilapidated and dirty. Yes, there is Wi-Fi, but it is very slow and only for teachers. The classrooms are dusty, and the fans are not working. The mess is okay. There are no sports activities at this university, and there is only one canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: PDM University psychology course review.

content.Placements: There is nothing like placement and package. They didn't even provide any kind of internship. We have to find different places for internships by ourselves. We are not even provided with any workshop related to our career counselling or internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi or AC on our campus. Labs are available for computer and medical-based courses but there is no lab for our practical. The canteen is quite average. Not many options are present in food or drinks. There are sports facilities provided to us.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is good for studying but not for hostels and meals.

content.Placements: There haven't been many placement opportunities, as no companies have come to the university to hire students. Many students come from poor families and are eager for placements, but unfortunately, there are none available. Throughout my entire course, I hardly heard the word "placement." While the academic aspect of the program is strong, the placement opportunities are lacking.
content.Infrastructure: The course is good. University have their own Wi-Fi but it can't work properly in other words Wi-Fi is not for students. Wi-Fi is for teachers and staff members. Hostels are NIT really good in a campaign of other hostels means another college hostels. Study is best in this college but not have any placement in pharmacy.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College was good but degree.

content.Placements: PDM University College of Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana: 60% of students are placed. The highest average package was 6 Lacs, and the lowest was 3 Lacs. Tata, Maruti, Toyota, and Galaxy are some of the top recruiters. 50% of students got internships from our course. Companies will be chosen by students.
content.Infrastructure: PDM University College of Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana has very good facilities and infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, washrooms, admin block, lifts, windows, AC, etc.
content.Faculty: Yes, teachers were helpful many times. All teachers were qualified, and some teachers are also from PDM University of Mechanical Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana. All teachers are knowledgeable, and the teaching is very good. Yes, it's very hard (50%).

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: PDM is the worst college ever.

content.Placements: In recent times, the college is going worse and worse. No placement in this college. Not a single company has come in recent times. For internships, they will tell you to do it yourself. Last year, one company came and offered a job with a 15,000 per month salary, but they had only 5 vacancies, and the crowd was too much. There is no placement in this college. Nobody gets placement in any course. If you came here for placement purposes, you will waste your money and time here. No placement, nothing. They will make you a fool.
content.Infrastructure: They have a very big campus area, but they have poorly maintained it. The hostel is also fully empty; no student lives here in the hostel. They take PG or rooms available to them because of the quality of food and living in a dark room. Buildings are getting old. Classrooms are dirty and are the house of birds. The fan is not working, and Wi-Fi is not working. Sports and games are jokes in this college. The quality of food is good, and the mess is clean. The mess staff is supportive, but the other departments are not good.

admission_overview.college_name: PDM University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Courses, Fee, Application Process

paragraphs: PDM University admission 2025 isopen. The university offers more than50 coursesacross various streams atundergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG) and doctoral levels.The diverse fields across which the university offers its courses areScience, Engineering,Humanities & Social Sciences,Medical & Health Sciences, and many more.PDM University offers both merit and entrance-based admission. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to fill out the admission criteria set by the college before applying for admission. Want to know more about PDM University admission,course-wise eligibility and selection criteria, go through the below article:

PDM University offers courses infull-timemode over50 courses. Some of the popularPDM University coursesare BSc, BPharma, BA LLB, BTech, BDS among others. The university also offers Lateral Entry courses for the course of BPharma and BTech. The application status 2025 at PDM University is currently open. Candidates can read the table below to learn more about PDM University Bahadurgarh courses criteria from the table presented below:

How to apply?
https://www.pdm.ac.in/

NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Candidates seeking admission for various courses are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. The admission criteria at PDM University are a mix of entrance and merit-based. Interested candidates can check out the below table forPDM University course eligibilityand selection criteria:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for more PDM University courses

PDM University feesfor all UG & PG courses include components such as tuition fees, hostel fees and one-time fee payments. Further,PDM University seatsmay vary as per the course type and number of specialisations available. Candidates can check the following table for detailed PDM University fees and seat intake for all the popular courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.
PDM University Admission Process 2025

PDM University admission process includes online application, Fill Form and upload documents, Application fee, Application Status, Scrutiny of Application and Counselling/Admission. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at PDM University:
STEP 1: PDM University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online after ensuring eligibility conditions. For online Application, students need to visit the official website https://www.pdm.ac.in/
STEP 2: Fill Form and Upload Documents
Duly filled in all relevant details on the online application form as per guidelines. Upload a recent passport-size photograph and a copy of the signature on the application form.
STEP 3: Application Fee

Complete the application process by paying the Application Fee. The application fee for the year is INR 1,000 (For UG & PG Course) & INR 500 (For Diploma Course). The Application fee payment can be made Online using Credit Card / Debit Card or via Scratch Card. Candidate may choose the payment option Cash payment at PDM also.
STEP 4: Application Status

After submission of the application form online, the system will generate an application number. The application number and details will be mailed to your registered mail address. Aspirants also check the status of the application form by visiting the link which will be available at the official website. Status can be checked by entering the registered mobile no.Candidates are advised to take two copies of the printout. One copy is to be submitted at the time of physical counselling. The second one is to be retained by the applicant.
STEP 5: Scrutiny of Application

Stages of scrutiny: Submitted the approved/rejected; the university admission committee will review each application form. Application forms will be approved / Rejected based on the qualification and other criteria as mentioned in the eligibility. Candidates will be intimidated through SMS or email.
STEP 6: Counselling/Admission
PDM University will send intimation about the Counseling / Admission schedule on the candidate's email address and registered mobile no.

faqs.question: How can I get BSc admission in PDM University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission at PDM University, the candidates need to meet the last educational qualification. The student should complete Class 12 with 50% aggregate. faqs.question: Is BSc available at PDM University?
faqs.answer: PDM University offers a three-year full-time BBA programme at the PG level. The course provides an opportunity for the student to undertake a two-month internship and also gives a choice to opt for a Dubai-based or IIM campus-based immersion. MBA is available in seven specialisations at IILM University, namelyBusiness Analytics with IBM,Human Resources, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is so bad. Most of the buildings are dilapidated and dirty. Yes, there is Wi-Fi, but it is very slow and only for teachers. The classrooms are dusty, and the fans are not working. The mess is okay. There are no sports activities at this university, and there is only one canteen.

reviews.review_heading: PDM University psychology course review.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi or AC on our campus. Labs are available for computer and medical-based courses but there is no lab for our practical. The canteen is quite average. Not many options are present in food or drinks. There are sports facilities provided to us.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for studying but not for hostels and meals.
reviews.review_text: The course is good. University have their own Wi-Fi but it can't work properly in other words Wi-Fi is not for students. Wi-Fi is for teachers and staff members. Hostels are NIT really good in a campaign of other hostels means another college hostels. Study is best in this college but not have any placement in pharmacy.

reviews.review_heading: College was good but degree.
reviews.review_text: PDM University College of Engineering, Bahadurgarh, Haryana has very good facilities and infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, washrooms, admin block, lifts, windows, AC, etc.

reviews.review_heading: PDM is the worst college ever.
reviews.review_text: They have a very big campus area, but they have poorly maintained it. The hostel is also fully empty; no student lives here in the hostel. They take PG or rooms available to them because of the quality of food and living in a dark room. Buildings are getting old. Classrooms are dirty and are the house of birds. The fan is not working, and Wi-Fi is not working. Sports and games are jokes in this college. The quality of food is good, and the mess is clean. The mess staff is supportive, but the oth...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities. Hostel is also good with good-quality meals.
reviews.review_text:
The campus is large, wide, pleasant, and fully Wi-Fi enabled.
Classes are regular, and the library has a huge collection of good agri-related books covering every subject.
Hostel facility was quite good with comfortable bedding and 24-hour electrification. The hostel was also fully covered with Wi-Fi.
The college has more than one canteen, 2-3 cafes (one of them is CCD).
The quality of meals in the mess was unexpectedly good.

reviews.review_heading: No placements and career disguise.
reviews.review_text: Buildings are getting old. Classrooms are dirty and are the house of birds. The fan was not working, and Wi-Fi is not working. Sports and games are jokes in this college. The quality of food is good, and the mess is clean. The mess staff is supportive, but the other departments are not good.

reviews.review_heading: PMD is the best.
reviews.review_text: They have a very big campus area, but they have poorly maintained it. The hostel is also fully empty; no student lives here in the hostel. They take pg or rooms available to them because of the quality of food living in a dark room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PDM University .
reviews.review_text:
The college has a good and clean building for their administration and work. These buildings are maintained from time to time. But buildings for students never get renovated, painted, or cleaned. 
Dirty and unorganised benches. Damaged fans, no LED bulbs, no AC and no working Wi-Fi.
Boys Hostel is a shabby place; garbage are thrown literally everywhere, every corner. Dirty toilets and unpurified drinking water.
Mess is the cleanest place in the whole hostel. Food quality is mid-like Not so spicy...

reviews.review_heading: Perfect atmosphere for students
reviews.review_text: The classes were well maintain and big in size with good quality of furniture. The rooms were fully ventilated and the fans were working properly. There was full safety and the department were separate of each course. The hostel were of every type ac, non ac and cooler. The mess was serving good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good infrastructure and a great environment on campus.
reviews.review_text: The college mess is very classy, and the college has a central library that includes every department. However, the college does not provide Wi-Fi for students. The hostel is good, and you can live there comfortably. The hostel food is very good, with different varieties available.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and amazing facility.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing and we have an in-campus canteen. The classrooms are big and amazing with proper ventilation and the hostels are good. There are AC and non AC rooms. Food is good and there is a gym inside the campus which is free for the students living in hostel. The mess is also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of PDM UNIVERSITY .
reviews.review_text: The only building good enough to stay in is the exception rest; all the infrastructure is shabby and the toilets are not hygienic at all. So if you are a female, it would be difficult for you. The canteen is very basic; you can only get noodles here and nothing else.

reviews.review_heading: PDM pharmacy university review.
reviews.review_text: The college has adequate space for games, labs, a library and classes. The college has Wi-Fi. Mess food is good and a medical rest room is also present for emergencies. Books in the library are sufficient for everyone and sports events are also actively organized by the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its hostel and classrooms.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, libraries, classrooms, etc. The library has books related to courses. Our college has good and friendly environment. The food served in the mess is good. They provide all types of food items. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. answer.text: No, it is not possible to get into North Bengal Medical College at 28460 rank via NEET UG. To secure a seat at the institute, candidates need to acquire a rank below or equal to the NEET UG cutoff. Considering the North Bengal Medical College cutoff 2024, the last round cutoff rank stood at 15433 for the MBBS course under General AI category. And, the 28460 rank is comparatively far more than the cutoff rank released by the institute for the General AI category candidates. So, students acquiring this rank will not be able to get admission at North Bengal Medical College. individual_reviews.title: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.

content.Placements: Many students prefer to pursue PG after completion of the course. Many students get job offers. The average package offered is 7 LPA. Internships are mandatory in government hospitals. Roles offered are JR and medical officer. The private hospital offers an attractive salary.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

individual_reviews.title: Follow and listen to your passion.

content.Placements: As this is a medical college, 100 percent got placed here, some got good placement, some got medium. The highest package offered in our college is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 30 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Manipal, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

individual_reviews.title: Good clinical exposure and poor hostel facilities.

North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26965 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26965 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 20278 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Review of North Bengal Medical College, Darjeeling.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are okay. Labs have all the required instruments and devices for practical experience. The library is also present, and it is good. Wi-Fi facility is available with limited data. There is a sports ground. Overall, it's quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Follow and listen to your passion.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course are free Wi-Fi, 3D labs, unlimited resources, HD classrooms, and a big library where each type of book is present. The quality of the hostel is very good, they provide double room facilities, and a clean room. Everything is nice. Food quality and quantity are both nice.

reviews.review_heading: The hidden gem  -  NBMC&H.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities in the academics are well built, but they lag behind in the hostel. Library is fully air conditioned and has a permanent Wi-Fi facility. The hostel is also very pockets friendly. It consists of 12 rupees per month. The campus is too huge.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, college infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: Campus was spread around 161 acres, one of the largest medical campuses in India. Wi-Fi and internet were available all over campus. It provided fully equipped labs for anatomy, physiology, microbiology, etc. There was a central library with huge amount of books, journals, digital resources, etc. Quality of food was good and served with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Good clinical exposure and poor hostel facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were okay. Labs and library were decent, but the classrooms needed an upgrade. The hostel was average, and the food was manageable but not very good. The Wi-Fi was slow. There was a sports ground, but it was not well maintained. Medical facilities were available 24x7. Overall, it was quite good..

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department facilities were also good. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and libraries were well-maintained. Wi-Fi provided a peaceful environment, and there were computers available for study-related work. If we had an important file, we could save it on the computer. The food in the canteen also tasted good, and we loved it.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: During the first year, we used to get a triple-seater room, and then in the second year, we got two-seater rooms. In the final year and internship, we get single rooms. Rooms are quite spacious with 24-hour power backup and constant water supply.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfied because of faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided for our department are very satisfying. The classrooms and labs are big and comfortable. A well-stocked library is available. The Wi-Fi facilities are available for everyone. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Very dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our course are not satisfying. Classrooms and labs are not cleaned and no proper ventilation system. The hostel rooms are very congested and small. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure provided for our department were very good. The mess food quality was hygienic, and many varieties of food were available in the canteen. A well-stocked library was present in a huge area. The hostel rooms were comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is bad among other facilities of the college, had a bad experience in the hostel with no proper quality of food also. The classrooms are not too big and clean enough. But have a huge playground and court for playing and labs with old instruments and equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, infrastructure is a little bit old to maintain transparency. All lecture theatre and department seminar rooms are air-conditioned. A library with free Wi-Fi services is there. Hostel facilities are moderate. Recently hostels has been painted and many modifications are done in the last few months.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college with a beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good, with air conditioned lecture theatres and a big central library with a huge collection of books. Wi-Fi is available in the academic areas. The hostel condition is not so good and needs renovation. The hostel mess food is good, and there is also the option of private mess in and around the campus. All medical facilities are available. There is a big playground on campus that hosts many events.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: We have a central library open from 9 am to 8 pm. Lab facilities are also good. Hostel supplies like the canteen and water supply are all good. All types of curricular activities are also provided apart from studies. Bathrooms are well-furnished with Indian and commode-type toilets and are regularly cleaned by PWD workers.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for MBBS in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good with air-conditioned lecture theatres and a big central library with tons of books. There is Wi-Fi present in the academics. The hostel condition is not so good and requires renovation work. The hostel mess food is good, and there is also the option of private mess in and around the campus. All the medical facilities are available.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.answer:
A:    Shri Krishna Government Ayurvedic College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur
Result awaited candidates can also apply.
The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good experience and good course.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides only a platform for internships and no campus placements. But after the course, students usually go for master's, and then they go for placements. Some top recruiting companies are Himalya and Patanjali. Students can go for government jobs too and get placed as AMO.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. No Wi-Fi facility is provided. You have to run to the office for each need. Hostel is fine and the mess is also fine. Rooms in the hostel are three-seater. Rooms are made like suites. Labs are fully occupied. Library is okay with air-conditioners.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with better facilities .

review_content.Placements: 100 seat per batch the highest package 100000 per annum the lowest package 50000 and top recruiting company like dabur and vadanta some job are provided by completing B.A.M.S. like medical officer and professor in medical College some students works as dermatologist in company .
review_content.Infrastructure: Many free facilities are provided by college like Wi-Fi and library facilities are also available and quality of food is average and hostel is wonderful and canteen is spacy and large and some sports are organised by college and indoor games are also available .

admission_overview.college_name: Kashmir University Admissions 2026: Eligibility, Applications, Eligibility and Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Kashmir University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Kashmir University admissions are merit and entrance-based. To get admission in Kashmir University, students must meet the eligibility. The university conducts an entrance test for admission to UG and PG courses.The university also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as CMAT/ GATE/ JEE Main/ UGAT/ CUET-UG for specific courses. Kashmir University offers programmes at UG, PG and doctoral levels in Humanities & Social Sciences, Information Technology (IT) & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Business & Management Studies, Law, etc. The university also offers courses in distance education mode via Directorate of Distance Education (DDE). The application process is done through online mode through the official portal of the college.

eligibility_selection.title: Kashmir University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Kashmir University offers admission via national or university-level entrance exams. Candidates must also meet eligibility to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 with a valid score. For graduation, a UG degree is required. The admission is entrance based. However, merit is also considered depending on the courses. Admission to Diploma and Certificate courses is merit-based. Check below popular Kashmir University courses with their eligibility and selection criteria: Course

paragraphs: Kashmir University admissionsare done through online mode. Candidates can fill out the form online or download it from university's website. The university releases the schedule online for courses. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1: Kashmir University Application Process 2026

Aspirants can apply online for the preferred course. The application links are available on the university's website. Candidates can also download the form for offline submission. Aspirants need to pay application fees of INR 400 and entrance test fees of INR 500.
2: Shortlisting of Students

The university conducts KUET for admission to UG and PG courses. Kashmir University also accepts scores in GATE/ CMAT/ GPAT/ UGAT for specific courses. Admission to diploma and certificate programmes is merit-based.
3: Release of Merit List

Kashmir University publishes a course-wise merit list on its official website. Students who make it to the rank list become eligible for admission to the applied course. Students must meetKashmir University Cutoffto get admission in preferred courses.
4: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Students shortlisted in the merit list are allotted seats. To confirm the seat, students have to pay Kashmir University fees. The total fees may differ at the time of payment due to the other variables of the fee structure. After fee payment, the candidate's admission is confirmed.

Candidates who have been shortlisted for aKashmir Universitycourse must pay the course fee, which varies fromINR 3,000 - 50,150. Kashmir University fees include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. Some of these components, such as the security fee are one-time chargeable. Other fee components could be refundable, non-refundable, to be paid semester-wise or annually. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance tests or last qualifying exam as required for theKashmir Universityadmission process. Check the table below to knowKashmir University feefor various courses:

The seat intake for all courses may differ as most of the courses are offered at the different campuses and affiliated colleges of Kashmir University. Tabulated below is the course-wise Kashmir University seat intake:
Course Name
Seats Intake

Fifty percent (50%) of seats available in a Programme/Course of study shall be filled up from Open merit category candidates. Remaining fifty percent (50%) of seats available in a Programme/Course shall be filled up from amongst the reserved categories in order of merit. faqs.question: Can I apply for Kashmir University admission?
faqs.answer: Kashmir University admissions are open for all courses. The college offers merit and entrance-based admission to all UG, PG, and Diploma courses. Candidates seeking admission to Kashmir University must fill out the online application form by visiting the university official website.

faqs.question: What is the criteria for admission to Kashmir University?
faqs.answer: Kashmir University offers admission to most of the courses based on entrance exam. The university conducts KUET for admission to UG and PG courses. The university also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as GPAT, UGAT, CUET, GATE, etc. for specific courses.

faqs.question: How to download the Kashmir University entrance test admit card?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to download their admit card from official website of Kashmir University by entering the application form number. Candidates without admit card, might not be allowed to appear for the test.

faqs.question: Can I get into Kashmir University for BTech without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can take admission in Kashmir University BTech programme without applying for JEE Main. To take admission into the programme, they would have to give the other entrance exam JKCET. Admission into the programme take place through both the JEE Main and JKCET entrance exam and candidates can appear for both the exams to get a valid score and secure admission into the programme.

placement_data.title: Kashmir University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Kashmir University detailed placement report 2025 is not released. According to the NIRF report 2025, UG 3-year median package recorded in 2024 was 10 LPA . 39 students out of 59 graduating students were placed .

The median package recorded during Kashmir University placement 2024 for PG 2-year courses was 10 LPA. A total of 501 students were placed and 339 students were selected for higher studies out of total 2889 graduating students.
The top recruiters during University of Kashmir placements in recent past were TCS, Amul, HCL, ONGC, HUL and many more.

highlights.description: Kashmir University has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #183 in the Southern Asia category, and #641 under Asia by the QS World University Rankings 2026. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around Kashmir University rankings:

nirf.description:
Kashmir University is consistently recognized as one of the top institutes across all major categories by NIRF 2023. It has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2023, Kashmir University climbed 26 ranks to #58 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'University (Overall)' category, the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2023, Kashmir University climbed 20 ranks to #33 rank in the 'University (Overall)' category by the NIRF ranking. Students can refer to the table below for the Kashmir University NIRF rankings:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Kashmir University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Kashmir University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Kashmir University fell 60 ranks to #641 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Kashmir University fell 11 ranks to #183 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Degree College, AnantnagReviewed on 17 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I suggest students join GDC, Anantnag, if they live nearby.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good with top-quality labs and experienced lecturers. It also has Wi-Fi facilities and clean classrooms with a hostel facility for students. It has a canteen, but the canteen is not well-maintained. It lacks good sports facilities, but overall, sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Degree College, AnantnagReviewed on 16 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good choice for those who live nearby.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connectivity is good, and sports instruments are also good. However, the gym is not well-maintained. Most equipment is rusty, and treadmills often show technical errors and do not work properly. The gym feels a bit suffocated. On the positive side, the ground area is very large, and more than five games can be played at the same time.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. Internet access for students is available in every corner of the university. Well-structured labs, smart classrooms with smart boards, projectors and much more. Talking about the library, it's 24/7 open for students. The hostel, food, and all facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Kashmir University: The legendary one.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good and up to the mark. You will get hygienic food there. Wi-Fi is available 24/7 on campus as well as in the hostel. There is a reading room in the hostel besides the central library. All the facilities are up to the mark, and sports events are organized in a good way.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government Degree College, AnantnagReviewed on 15 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of GDC Anantnag (Shaheed Himayu Muzammil Memorial).
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are always neat and clean. The sitting arrangement is always good. The library is always open, and the staff in the library are always friendly. There are 2 libraries, one for medical students and 2nd for arts students. The books are so interesting, I read a lot of books related to psychology.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Islamia College of Science and CommerceReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent college; I love it.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very well maintained and clean. Many workers look after the hygiene system. They clean floors every day. There are ACs inbuilt, and every classroom is neat and clean. There is also Wi-Fi available in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Islamia College of Science and CommerceReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty, and great placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is very good. Our labs are maintained, and our college Wi-Fi is very good. Classrooms and the library are also good and well-maintained. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is extremely good, and the quality of food is the best that is available in the mess and also in the canteen. A medical facility is also available here. Sports and games are conducted every day by the Department of Physical Education.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Government Degree College, AnantnagReviewed on 8 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college with beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: There are quite good facilities: a hostel for boys and girls with accommodation for about 250 students. There are Wi-Fi hotspots available at the central library, browsing center, and smart board classrooms with well-equipped devices and surveillance around. With ATM facilities inside the campus and a nice, newly constructed canteen with a big hall and a table tennis court. Sports tournaments are organized according to the annual college calendar.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Government Degree College, AnantnagReviewed on 27 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent college, but needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Decent infrastructure with a large campus and free Wi-Fi hotspots available at the library and other blocks. Classrooms are nice for our department with smart boards. The library is nice with a digitized system. I don't know about the hostel because I am a local. Sports games are also played in college. I heard the canteen is average. The rest of the buildings, labs, and central library are quite decent, and also the campus is very beautiful and well-maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government Degree College, SumbalReviewed on 30 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GDC Sumbal - Peaceful campus with scope for growth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of GDC Sumbal is decent and improving every year. Classrooms are spacious. Basic facilities like a library, computer lab, and science labs are available. Wi-Fi access is limited. There is no hostel facility yet, and students commute from nearby areas. The natural surroundings and peaceful environment are a plus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Islamia College of Science and CommerceReviewed on 29 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I rate it a solid 8.5 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. New buildings are being constructed. The library is also big, with four floors containing every book. The hostel, mess, sports, and medical facilities are amazing, except for the washrooms and canteen, which are a bit untidy. The washrooms are not cleaned properly, and the canteen does not care about hygiene, as they don't use good oil for preparing meals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Of Kashmir, Kupwara CampusReviewed on 14 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course or department are quite good. Library is present with a collection of books. Classrooms are good. The quality of facilities available in the college is good. Limited sports facilities are available in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government Degree College, SoporeReviewed on 14 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi, smart boards, and the library. Facilities are very good. The food quality is not good and the quantity is not enough. There is self-service in our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Government Degree College, TralReviewed on 13 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Satisfied with my college because of the atmosphere and teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: If we talked about facilities available in our college, the furniture and the seating arrangement were good. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms and the library were spacious and good. There was also one small canteen for students. Hostel was not present in the college. You had to take accommodation outside or go back home.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by University Of Kashmir, Kupwara CampusReviewed on 29 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are sufficient in my locality colleges. The library is available with a lot of books. Labs are available with well-equipped equipment. Sports and games are quite sad. A basic medical kit is available.

college_info.college_name: Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth ranks #36 under the category 'Dental'.

The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Established in 1989, Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth is a private institute in Pune, Maharashtra. The institute is approved by the DCI. At the UG, PG and Doctorate levels, the institute offers 17 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth programs include BDS, MDS and Ph.D. Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 157 students. The fees at Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth ranges between INR 23,65,000 to 45,67,500 for the different courses. Dental College and Hospital, Pune, Bharati Vidyapeeth placements are vibrant, with the average median salary standing at around INR 5,41,265. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Q. Which courses are offered by Bharati Vidyapeeth Dental College and Hospital?

A. It offers courses such as BDS and MDS.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college .

review_content.Placements: No placements for BDS I don't know about other courses but generally in India we do not have placements for medical fields so I think that is the case here as well. Otherwise the college is pretty decent including infrastructure faculty etc. So yes no placements through college .
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is one of the best from many of the dental colleges I have seen especially the hostel. The hostel doesn't even give the feel of hostel it feels like you are staying at a hotel here I am talking about the new ladies hostel where I lived.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good deemed to be university for dentistry.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the best dental colleges. It is a private college (deemed to be university), but the patient flow and the faculty are very good. You can get a lot of exposure to patients as well as other clinical tips. Its ranking is among the top 10. MS is also available here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good, and the food can be rated 4 out of 5. The new ladies hostel building is good but a little costly. Rooms are clean, and other services are nice. Paid laundry service is available. Study rooms are available with fixed timings. It is clean and hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a complete package with a sprinkle of fun to complete your dentistry.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the top-rated colleges in India. There is a very high probability that you will get good placements from this college. A lot of reputed hospitals and good clinics all over India hire you when you complete your education from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Hygiene is maintained here. It is safe for patients as well as doctors and students. Every department has working dental chairs. It has a proper seating arrangement in classrooms for students along with learning facilities.

On the other hand, the MBA is provided by the School of Management and Commerce. The minimum eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 from a recognised board. These programmes are offered in full-time mode. Apart from these, the university provides other UG, PG, Doctoral and Diploma programmes such as BA/MA, BCom, BTech, BSc (Hons), and BPharma.
