admission_overview.college_name: Sanskaram University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Sanskaram University admission 2025 is merit-based. The university offers over 30 UG, PG and Doctorate programmes through its School ofEngineering, Health & Allied Science,Hospitalityetc. Some of the popular courses atSanskaram Universityare MBA, BTech, MTech, BSc and MSc. The university offers BTech, MTech, BCA, BSc, MSc, MCA and PhD courses through the School of Engineering. Sanskaram University provides various scholarships, including those based on CUET scores, sports achievements, and merit-cum-means (MCM) criteria. The MCM scholarship is applicable only for the first-year tuition fee. Students can apply for scholarships starting in July.

The university offers courses across various specialisations, and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more aboutSanskaram University courseadmission highlights for 2025:
Particulars
Sanskaram University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
30+ courses across various specialisations
How to apply?
Application Status
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Sanskaram University offers courses at multiple levels through its 12 schools, namely Engineering & Technology, Management & Commerce, Medical & Allied Science, Basic & Applied Sciences, Hotel Management, Architecture and Agricultural Science, Humanities and Education. Check below the top KRMU courses along with their eligibility, fee and selection criteria:
Sanskaram University admission process include registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in Sanskaram University:
STEP 1: Sanskaram University Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of Sanskaram University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection
Sanskaram University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates need to pay theSanskaram University course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Optometry (BOPTM) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A Perfect College for Students Who Thrive on Learning

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students were placed in our course. The highest offering packages can go up to 19.8 LPA depending upon your performance, and the lowest is about 1.2 LPA. All the students go on internships at well-known hospitals with stipends. Hospitals like Aditya Jot, Dr. Agrawal, Ojas Eye Hospital, Infigo Eye Care, and Kenia Eye Hospital provide internships to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good and sufficient for our course. There is also a library with books needed for your course and related topics. There is a computer lab that students can use for their research, projects, or studying. There is no hostel or dorm provided by the college, but the college is nearby the dorms and hostels. The food quality of the canteen is average, but the college is near food corners, which makes it easier for students to buy food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: ITM institute is located at a highly visible site in the city.

review_content.Placements: Placements are also good for various courses. Placement cell is organized in different courses. The average package of this university is between 4-5 LPA. Placement processes were easy, and college provides every necessary support. Placements in this college are great.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure in the department are well-designed with Wi-Fi facilities connected labs and classrooms having digital boards available. The library has a wide range of books, including different biographies. The canteen serves a variety of foods, not just Indian but also South Indian, and the quality of food is really good.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good facilities. Teachers are good and the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students got placed in the course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 90,000 per month. The average salary offered is around Rs. 30,000 - Rs. 40,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is around Rs. 15,000 - Rs. 20,000 per month. Around 90-95% of students got internships. Roles offered are lab technician, microbiologist, histopathologist, and professor.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college. Our classrooms are good. A library is available in the college. The hostel is not available here. Our canteen provides good food. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

individual_reviews.title: Unlocking my review of ITM - Institute of Health Sciences.

content.Placements: Most of the students were placed by campus about 100%, and the highest package was 6 lakhs this year, and the average package is 3.5 lakhs to 4 lakhs. content.Infrastructure: Our college faculty is excellent and well-educated, with a spacious library that has an extensive collection of medical and research-related books. Almost every book is available, making it a perfect resource for students. In short, everything is comfortable for students.

All the students go on internships at well-known hospitals with stipends. Hospitals like Aditya Jot, Dr. Agrawal, Ojas Eye Hospital, Infigo Eye Care, and Kenia Eye Hospital provide internships to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good and sufficient for our course. There is also a library with books needed for your course and related topics. There is a computer lab that students can use for their research, projects, or studying. There is no hostel or dorm provided by the college, but the college is nearby the dorms and hostels. The food quality of the canteen is average, but the college is near food corners, which makes it easier for students to buy food.

admission_overview.college_name: ITM - Institute of Health Sciences Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fees, Application Process

admission_overview.title: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences admissions are merit based. This college offers students four different programmes such as Bachelor of Optometry, BSc Medical Laboratory Technology, Masters of Optometry and Masters in Medical Lab Technology. Students can apply both online or offline by filling an application form for ITM- Institute of Health Sciences. Students are further required to appear for the personal interview. The UG courses are of a four-year duration while PG courses are of two-year duration. Aspirants must fulfil the academic eligibility criteria for applying to different courses at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences.

eligibility_selection.title: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: ITM-Institute of Health Sciences offers admission on merit basis and have different eligibility criteria for bachelors and masters programme. Candidates applying for UG programmes must have passed Class 12 with 40% marks for general category students and 35% marks for reserved category students and those applying for PG programmes must have a UG degree. Following table lists the ITM-Institute of Health Sciences courses and their eligibility criteria and selection process.

Candidates must have passed class 12 with Science (PCB) and an aggregate of at least 40% marks

faqs.answer: The minimum required percentage in class 12 for admission in ITM-Institute of Health Science in UG courses is 40% for general category students and 35% for the reserved category students.

faqs.answer: Students at ITM-Institute of Health Science are selected based on their academic performance, comprehension and articulation, confidence, general awareness, and co-curricular activities. Each criterion is equally important, and applicants are evaluated based on their overall performance.

admission_process.title: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences admissionis merit based. Students fulfilling the eligibility criteria can initiate the admission process.
Following are the detailed steps that should be followed for taking admission in various courses of ITM- Institute of Health Sciences:
Application Process

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria have to register for their course of choice on the official website of the college. They should upload all the required documents and pay the application fee of INR 500.
Selection Round

ITM- Institute of Health Sciences selects students through personal interview. The interview is judged on their past academic performance, comprehension and articulation, grooming, general awareness and co-curricular activities. Therefore, overall performance is taken into consideration.
Final Selection and Counselling

The shortlisted candidates are reached out by college counsellor who will guide them for further process. Interested students need to pay the course fees to confirm their admission and reserve their seats.

ITM - Institute of Health Sciencescourse fee includes tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. Students who get selected have to pay admission fee as the final step for seat confirmation. The below table mentions theITM - Institute of Health Sciences fee structurefor available courses:

courses_data.name: ITM - Institute of Health Sciences B.Sc. Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences offers a four- year long BSc in Medical Laboratory Technology course at undergraduate level. The Medical Laboratory Technology course is divided into eight semesters. Candidates must have Physics, Chemistry and Biology in Class 12 with an aggregate of 40% marks for general category students and 35% marks for reserved category students.

faqs.question: What is the duration of BSc Medical Laboratory Technology course at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The BSc Medical Laboratory Technology course at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences is a four- year undergraduate level programme. This course is divided into eight semesters.

faqs.question: How many BSc specialisations can I apply to, at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences offers BSc in Medical Laboratory Technology specialisation course. Students can apply through online or offline application.

faqs.question: What are the subjects taught in the first year of the BSc Medical Laboratory Technology at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Anatomy, Physiology, and Medical Biochemistry are the three core subjects taught in the first year of BSc Medical Laboratory Technology course at ITM- Institute of Health Science.

faqs.question: What is the total number of seats in the BSc Medical Laboratory Technology course at ITM- Institute of Health Science?
faqs.answer: A total of 300 seat is offered in the BSc Medical Laboratory Technology course at ITM- Institute of Health Science. However, the given number of seats are taken from the official website of the college. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

courses_data.name: ITM - Institute of Health Sciences BOPTM Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ITM- Institute of Health Sciencesoffers a four-year Bachelor of Optometry (BOPTM) course. This course is divided into eight semesters. Candidates must have Physics, Chemistry and Biology in class 12 with at least 40% marks, while a relaxation of 5% is given to the reserved category students. So, they should score 35% marks.

faqs.question: What are the subjects taught in the first- year of the BOPTM course at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Anatomy and Physiology, Basic Optics, Visual Science and General Pathology are the four subjects that are taught in the first-year of the BOPTM course at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences.

faqs.question: Is internship compulsory before taking admission in the BOPTM course at ITM- Institute of Health Science?
faqs.answer: No, internships are not compulsory before taking admission in BOPTM course at ITM- Institute of Health Science. Students are offered a 12-month internship at leading hospitals during the course.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BOPTM at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of BOPTM at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences is INR 2.1L- 3L and this includes various components. However, the given fee amount is taken from the official website of the college. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission in BOPTM course at ITM-Institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Candidate must have passed class 12 with physics, chemistry and biology with at least 40% marks for general category students and a relaxation of 5% is given to the reserved category students.

courses_data.name: ITM - Institute of Health Sciences M.Optom. Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ITM- Institute of Health Sciences offers a dynamic two-year Masters of Optometry (M Optom) course at postgraduate level. The course is divided into four semesters. The candidate must possess Optometry or equivalent degree and completed a compulsory clinical internship. The programme also offers a global exchange programme.

faqs.question: What are the subjects taught in the first semester of Master of Optometry Course at ITM- institute of Health Sciences?
faqs.answer: Epidemiology and Community Eyecare, Research Methodology and Biostatistics, Ocular Diseases and Diagnostics, Pediatric Optometry and Clinic are the subjects taught in the first semester of Masters of Optometry course at ITM- institute of Health Sciences.

faqs.question: What are the total tuition fees of Master of Optometry at ITM- Institute of Health Science?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of Masters of Optometry at ITM- Institute of Health Science is INR 2 lakh. However, the given fee amount is taken from the official website of the college. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam of the college for admission in Master of Optometry at ITM- Institute of Health Science?
faqs.answer: No, the admissions for Masters of optometry at ITM- Institute of Health Science is merit- based and candidate does not have to give any particular entrance exam.

faqs.answer: To take admission in the Masters of Optometry at ITM- Institute of Health Sciences, the candidate must hold an optometry or equivalent degree and complete a compulsory clinical internship.

reviews.review_heading: It provides knowledgeable teachers especially vision therapy and exam pattern is helpful.

reviews.review_heading: University infra and faculty members are good but the placements and management are the worst.

They have one library which is average in size and approximately all the books which are related to our course are available in the library but the worst thing is that not all the books are available for the students. Food quality is quite good and there is only a girl’s hostel which has two floors. University has no playground for sports. Medical facilities are good. Classrooms and labs are normal without any AC.

reviews.review_heading: ITM is a good college for medical students.

Facilities like medical, mess and canteen are available in both college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements if you are good at studying.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and hostel facility is not provided here, students can rent a PG with 2,3 other students and live. We do have a library and a computer lab as well, classrooms are also spacious. The college is surrounded by stress which provides a good environment.

highlights.summary: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research admissions 2025 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro:
Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research popular programmes are DPharm and BPharma. The college aims to equip students with the knowledge and skills that are necessary to meet the growing demands of today's scientists who are working on various pharmaceutical and drug development projects. This is done by giving students a thorough understanding of the field of drug medicine. This programme will greatly educate the students while also preparing them to work in clinics, hospitals, or medical offices.
Overall, Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research is one of the widely known colleges present in India. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research and their respective eligibility and Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research fee structure:

Ltd.Cooper Pharma Ltd.Triage Meditech

faqs.answer: A:    The University has disclosed the combined 2023 placement statistics for all the associated schools. As per the record,  82% of the batch was placed in 2023. Further, over 850 companies from diverse sectors participated in the placement drive. faqs.question: How are the placements at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research offers UG, PG, and PhD courses to students. These courses are provided across the Pharmacy and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BPharma courses to students. The college also provides a three-year BPharma (Lateral Entry) course to students. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MPharma to students. The college also provides PhD and diploma courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research and their respective eligibility and Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research are different from one course to another. To be eligible for a UG course, a candidate must have completed Class 12 with 45- 50% aggregate from a recognised board. For PG courses, however, students must have completed their undergraduate degree with at least 60% aggregate.Given below is a table giving a brief overall of all Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research courses and their eligibility criteria:CourseEligibilitySelection CriteriaD.PharmaClass 10 and Class 12 from PCBM subjects with 45% aggregateMerit-BasedM.PharmaB Pharma degree approved by PCI with 60% aggregate scoreMerit-BasedPharm DClass 10 and Class 12 with PCM/PCB subjects with 60% and any other qualification approved by PCI is also eligibleMerit-BasedB.PharmaClass 10 and Class 12 with 55% aggregate (45% for SC/ST candidates) with Physics and Chemistry and along with any one of Mathematics/Biology/BiotechnologyMerit-Based
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    To be eligible for admission to all UG and Diploma courses applicants must have Class 12 with a 40-50% aggregate score. Additionally, for PG courses the institute set percentage criteria for admission must have a 60 % aggregate in graduation degree.
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    The candidate must have passed Class 12 examination with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology or Mathematics subjects with 45% aggregate or equivalent Grade Point Average (GPA) can apply for admission. Class 12 from NIOS is eligible for admission at  Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research. Apart from this, the duration of the course is two years.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for DPharma course at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research requires a 60% aggregate score in a graduation degree in MPharma. The institute offers direct admission. The tuition fees for this course range from INR 3 lakh. The institute offers two specialisation in MPharma including M.Pharm. in Pharmaceutics and M.Pharm. in Pharmacology.

faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research offers direct admission at UG, PG, diploma, and doctoral levels. To be eligible for UG courses students, must fill out the basic eligibility i.e., pass Class 12 with 45-50% from a recognised board. Additionally, applicants seeking admission to any PG courses must have a graduation degree with a 60% aggregate score.
faqs.question: Q: Can I join Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research directly?

faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research admission is merit-based. To proceed with filling out the application form, applicants must visit the official website of Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University and apply for the desired course. After filling out the eligibility and getting shortlisted on merit candidates must pay the non-refundable admission fee of INR 7000 to grab the final seat.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission to Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research are different from one course to another. To be eligible for a UG course, a candidate must have completed Class 12 with 45- 50% aggregate from a recognised board. For PG courses, however, students must have completed their undergraduate degree with at least 60% aggregate.Given below is a table giving a brief overall of all Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research courses and their eligibility criteria:CourseEligibilitySelection CriteriaD.PharmaClass 10 and Class 12 from PCBM subjects with 45% aggregateMerit-BasedM.PharmaB Pharma degree approved by PCI with 60% aggregate scoreMerit-BasedPharm DClass 10 and Class 12 with PCM/PCB subjects with 60% and any other qualification approved by PCI is also eligibleMerit-BasedB.PharmaClass 10 and Class 12 with 55% aggregate (45% for SC/ST candidates) with Physics and Chemistry and along with any one of Mathematics/Biology/BiotechnologyMerit-Based

overview_faqs.question: What is Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research is famous for its state of the art infrastructure. Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research offers various facilities to students such as modern classrooms, a big library, conference halls, and others. For students who find the Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research fee expensive, there are scholarships available.

overview_faqs.question: Is it mandatory to pay the registration fee online at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: No, it is mandatory to pay the registration fee online in Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, because the admission form mode is online and offline. The candidates can fill out the form online and offline on their official website. Candidates use both the mode online and offline to pay the fee. Because without a registration fee, the college can’t submit the admission form online or offline.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing BPharm at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is the flagship programme offered at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research. BPharma students are placed in top companies at top positions such as GSK, Cooper Pharma Ltd., Life Cell, and many others. BPharma students can go for MPharma courses or can even opt to work for various companies in top job profiles.

overview_faqs.question: Is there any ragging culture at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research?
overview_faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research has an Anti-Ragging Committee. There are various guidelines issued by the University Grants Commission, New Delhi to restrict ragging. Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research maintains strict guidelines against the ragging. The anti-ragging committee includes the following people:NamePositionDr. Ritika MehraSchool of Engineering & ComputingChairpersonSh. review_summary.college_name: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The facilities are really good, and the faculty members are also very good.

content.Placements: The placement is very good in my course, and the package of my known person got was 18 LPA, and it depends on your skills, you can get more if you have potential.
content.Infrastructure: My department has its own library, and everything is well-maintained. The library and classrooms have projectors, and the process for issuing the books is very simple, all the books are available in the library. They provide books for the whole semester.
content.Faculty: The teachers are well-qualified and knowledgeable. They are also very supportive of the students. The curriculum of this course is very relevant, and they also take students for industrial visits and many other guest lectures, which makes students industry-ready. Teachers provide question banks that help students a lot to prepare for their exams.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured course with good infrastructure and an active campus life.

content.Placements: The highest package is 12 LPA, the average package is 4-5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2-3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Cipla. Internship opportunities for 60-70% of students. The top roles offered include Software Developer, Data Analyst, and QA/QC.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with modern teaching aids like projectors, smart boards, and comfortable seating. Wi-Fi with high data ensures for faculty and students. The library has a rich collection of textbooks, reference materials, and digital sources. Common areas include study lounges, seminar halls, and discussion areas.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members and placement for my college.

content.Placements: Maximum 10,000 students get placed in my college. Many companies are coming to our college like Cipla, Deloitte, Infosys, and Amazon. The highest package is 10 LPA. The lowest package is 5 LPA. 70% of students got internships in the college of Dehradun.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are all available. Sports are so creative. Mess is so excellent and food is also provided. Wi-Fi is available in all departments. Hostel is available in the fast speed work. Classrooms are so impressed. Projectors and digital TVs are available in all classrooms. There is a library and all books are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college at an affordable price.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered at my college was 1 lakh per annum, which was very good compared to other colleges. The lowest salary package was INR 70,000. The best companies come to our college for campus placements, and they provide us with a golden opportunity to work for them. The top roles offered by the companies are in HR and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good facilities and infrastructure. The quality of the building structure and management are very good, which makes for a clean and good environment for the children to study in. They also have a big lush green ground for games and sports like cricket and Kabbadi.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall is very good college.

content.Placements: In my college, the highest placement in the Pharmacy department is 3.5 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average package is 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: My college has three types of hostels: two-bed, three-bed, and one special AC hostel with a heater. The hostel mess is very good, with a new menu every day.
content.Faculty: All my teachers are highly educated and motivate students a lot. The class results are approximately 80%, showing how supportive the faculty is.

Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research admission processis carried out by filling out theDev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research registration form. Candidates looking for admission to anyUG, PG, Diploma, and PhD courses. Go through the following section to learn more about theDev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research admission process 2025:
Step 1: Visit the Dev Bhoomi University Website

Candidates looking for admission to various programme at Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research must fill out the admission form online and offline by visiting the official website ofDev Bhoomi University (admissions.dbuu.ac.in)and visiting the university physically for offline admission. The candidates need to pay theapplication fee of INR 1,500during the process.
Step 2: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research Selection Round

To be eligible for admission candidates must fill out the selection criteria, the selection criteria is the candidates must passClass 12 for admission to UG with 45-50% aggregateand agraduation degree with 60 % aggregatefor admission toMPharma. The university releases the shortlisted candidates list for based on their scores in the last qualifying exams.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research will release a merit list of the selected applicants for all courses for the final seat allotment.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates must make a non-refundable admissionfee payment of INR 7000within the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research offers direct admission. After filling out all the eligibility criteria, applicants must fill out the application form from Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University.

faqs.question: Can I do an MPharma from Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research with 40% marks in graduation?

reviews.review_heading: The facilities are really good, and the faculty members are also very good.
reviews.review_text: My department has its own library, and everything is well-maintained. The library and classrooms have projectors, and the process for issuing the books is very simple, all the books are available in the library. They provide books for the whole semester.

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured course with good infrastructure and an active campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with modern teaching aids like projectors, smart boards, and comfortable seating. Wi-Fi with high data ensures for faculty and students. The library has a rich collection of textbooks, reference materials, and digital sources. Common areas include study lounges, seminar halls, and discussion areas.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and placement for my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are all available. Sports are so creative. Mess is so excellent and food is also provided. Wi-Fi is available in all departments. Hostel is available in the fast speed work. Classrooms are so impressed. Projectors and digital TVs are available in all classrooms. There is a library and all books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college at an affordable price.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities and infrastructure. The quality of the building structure and management are very good, which makes for a clean and good environment for the children to study in. They also have a big lush green ground for games and sports like cricket and Kabbadi.

reviews.review_heading: Overall is very good college.
reviews.review_text: My college has three types of hostels: two-bed, three-bed, and one special AC hostel with a heater. The hostel mess is very good, with a new menu every day.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful Experience in This, Good Placement
reviews.review_text: The college has well-equipped labs and well-furnished classrooms. Wi-Fi is provided to the hostels, and each department has its own library with proper facilities. Boys' and girls' hostels are separate and have proper security systems. The college has a canteen and mess and organizes sports meets for students, with separate games for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for your money's worth. Faculty members are very good and have higher degrees.
reviews.review_text: Honestly, I do not live in a hostel, so I am not aware of hostel infrastructure, but according to my classmates who stay in hostels, the infrastructure is average, not poor or high, but it depends on BH. The course infrastructure is quite good. There are well-ventilated rooms, and the labs are also well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in our college for students. Our college has a separate library for every department with well-stocked books. Students can borrow books from the library without any charges. The food served in the canteen is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the department and its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel in our college is not so good. Sometimes, students face problems with electricity. There are monkeys roaming around the hostel rooms. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but one must visit here once before taking admission and infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The room consists of projectors, fans, a library facility is also there, laboratories for particular subjects are also provided. Hostel rooms consist of three sharing beds with a study table, washroom attached to them. Sweepers are assigned. Mess facility is also available, the canteen is also there. The medical facilities can be availed at the college hospital. Sports and games are promoted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dev Bhoomi Institute of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided only for hostelers, not day scholars. The labs are clean but do not have all the required equipment and chemicals. The classrooms are good, but some of them are not equipped with projectors. The ease of life in the hostel is poor. The hostel mess is not good. They don't provide proper meals, and the mess staff are irresponsible.

reviews.review_heading: DBGI is quite different and good compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: There are hi-tech classrooms with projector, and the entire campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Stocks of books are available for students of every department, and there are good labs with the equipment. The food served in the mess is very poor in terms of taste, and students can't eat properly. Even they are becoming sick day by day.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, placements and the performance of my friends.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is very good. There is a free Wi-Fi facility for the students. Our classrooms are neat and clean. The library is huge and full of books. Medical facilities are also available here. Digital classes are also available here. Sports meets are conducted on the campus. Outdoor games facilities are also available. Inter-college sports events like CPL
and HPL are conducted in our college. Our labs are very clean, and there is a clean glassware. Students usually wear a p...

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college with an affordable fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best. A lot of infrastructural facilities are provided here. Some additional facilities are also available for students who are interested in availing them. We also have an ayurvedic hospital where both the students and faculty members get treatment for free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Dev Bhoomi Institute of Pharmacy and Research.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the location of the college is awesome. The campus is free from noise pollution. The infrastructure of all the departments is well-designed. Our college offers all the courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Dental College and Hospital, Hyderabad.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has about 150 batch students, and only 60% of students passed out on the first attempt. Mostly they open a private clinic with average earnings of Rs. 50,000-60,000 per month. Some of my colleagues do preparation for post-graduate and take admission in government college with a monthly stipend of Rs. 60,000 and some prepare for a government job with limited seats and high competition. Some of them got a seat with a salary of Rs. 60,000 per month. It was tough to clear the NEET exam and the government exam, so the best option is to open a private clinic with good earnings. Some of my colleagues who are MS got a salary package of 2-3 LPA each month with good practice. So there is a lot of scopes to do government job, post-graduation and private clinic. You can do a post-graduation in eight branches of dentistry include prosthodontics, orthodontics, oral and maxillofacial surgery, oral medicine and radiology, pedodontics, endodontic, preventive dentistry and periodontology.

review_content.Placements: Many students are placed, but I don't know exactly because I am in the 1st year of the course. Salary packages offered are also good. This course needs interest and skill. There are many departments in BDS which you can select in PG. Approximately 60% of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: This course requires a high infrastructure, and our college has good infrastructure and facilities. Our college provides a library, study room and labs which are required. Hostel rooms are good but not that good. There are many sports and games. Food served is good, and there is also a canteen.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Top dental college in Telangana.

content.Placements: There's a compulsory internship conducted by every college across the country in the 5th academic year. The internship involves clinical practice in all the departments of dentistry. During this year, all the students are posted in every department to gain in-depth knowledge of the subject through clinicals.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is pretty good. It is a 5-story building that accommodates both a college and a dental hospital. This building accommodates all nine dental departments. The clinics, lecture halls and laboratories are all there. Each lecture hall can accommodate 100 students, each well-equipped with a projector, furniture and necessary electronics. The campus also has a library with all the amenities necessary for the students, including books related to dentistry written by authors all around the world.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and nice practice for students.

content.Placements: My college is the only government college in Telangana state. In NEET, we should get 450+ marks to get a seat in our college. So that we get nice practice when we leave our college, many members choose MS courses or go abroad. MS in our college has bright future.
content.Infrastructure: Experienced faculty members and good infrastructure. We have no Wi-Fi but the instruments are good. We do get handful of material to do treatment of the patients. Hostel is pretty good with 3 members per room. We have two nice messes and 1 cafeteria. Sports activities are a big plus.

individual_reviews.title: Nice faculty, average infrastructure, and a good future.

content.Placements: As of now, the intake of GDC and H is 100%. The faculty are excellent when it comes to teaching and discipline. All students get the internship once the four years are completed. Once we finish the course, we can get placements in different hospitals as well as government jobs. We can also opt to go abroad to do MDS. Senior resident placements are also available.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and affordable college for a good career.

review_content.Placements: This is a renowned dental college in the state. A few days ago the college got an A grade by NAAC. Students got enough marks to get a paid housestaffship in the government hospital. They can also get good jobs including government ones through their marks and aggregate. Many students secure a good rank in NEET PG exams and also develop themselves in the research field as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is well decorated. The college buildings are also well situated. They have Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms and labs. The labs are good, but they need some upgrading. Otherwise, the clinical and preclinical labs also have good infrastructure and instrumentation. They need upgrading to match the quality of this institution. There are separate hostels for boys and girls inside the campus. Two or three students can be accommodated in one room. The food quality needs upgrading as well as proper management. There is a canteen in the hostel itself. Students can play in the huge playground. They can also play some indoor games in the common room as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a top private dental college in Kolkata.

review_content.Placements: It is a good college with ample research opportunities, As it is a dental college, students after passing out get government jobs in hospitals or opt for higher studies. For the year 2021, almost 80% of the students got placed or opted for private practice and the rest opted for higher studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very nice. It has an integrated campus with Guru Nanak Institute of Technology. But its campus is separated from that and has a large green campus of 5.2 acres. Security is provided at gates. There are separate hostels for boys and girls available. Mess food is fine not that great. Annual festival, and several competitions are held every year. Labs are well maintained. Free Wi-Fi is there for students only. Classrooms are air-conditioned for UG and PG both. Large library is available for knowledge-thirsty students. Canteen and cafeterias are available. Annual sports are held every year.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a well-renowned college and NAAC accredited college in West Bengal.

content.Placements: This is a 5 years of course including internships mandatory. Around 80% of students paas their internships in each year, and many of them opt for post graduation and house staff. The highest salary offered is Rs 30,000 per month. The minimum salary offered is Rs 20,000 per month. There are no such companies to recruiting students. There are many roles like post graduation, government jobs, private clinic, and nursing home.
content.Infrastructure: In many departments, there is a lack of many infrastructure and instruments. So, the students should borrow their instruments to work in the department. Classrooms are good, and air-conditioners are available. On the top floor i.e 8th, there is a library containing adequate amounts of books, and one best thing is that students can bring the books home for themselves. Hostel rooms are good but the food quality needs to be improved.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good as it provides all the facilities and faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 40 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 6 LPA. Students get recruited as lectures in government or private colleges after doing master degree, or students can pursue other courses after completion of our graduation, or they can open their own clinic. Almost 100% of students get internships after passing final year in Oral and Maxillo Facial Surgeon.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very beautiful and clean. It provides smart classrooms and our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Our library has an adequate amount of books for ample knowledge. Lodging facilities are good but food quality is average. Sports and games are played regularly and intra-college as well inter-college tournaments are also held regularly to encourage students, and to encourage their sporting spirit along with their studies.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Amritsar:

faqs.answer: A:    Government Medical College, Amritsar has courses such as MD, PG Diploma, MS, B.Sc. (Post Basic), MBBS to offer. These courses are in the stream of Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. Government Medical College, Amritsar has specializations such as MD specializations in Community Medicine, Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Physiology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Anatomy, PG Diploma specializations in Anaesthesia, Pediatrics, Ophthalmology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Pathology, Pulmonary Medicine, MS specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: Which courses does Government Medical College, Amritsar offer to students?

reviews_list.review_title: Best medical college for new found freedom after NEET.

review_content.Placements: Im from batch 2022, MBBS placement in the medical field is less of a headache than other streams due to the doctor-per-patient ratio provided you opt for a PG degree. As an intern stipend is Rs. 15000, in PG and JRs get Rs. 60,000. It's one of the oldest and most reputed medical colleges in Punjab, having completed 100 years in 2020.
review_content.Infrastructure: Buildings need some development, the ones that are quite old but everything is available. We have Wi-Fi in hostel. Library is pretty nice. Hostels are pretty decent, now there's a new block built for boys which is much better so hostels would not be a problem. We have one the best grounds and sports, there's CISCO for indoor games and a well-made gymnasium. All the departments have good facilities, again I'll say they are a bit outdated but available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a really great college with good faculty, excellent sports infrastructure, and food quality.

review_content.Placements: It is a very old college, so it has a great alumni network in the country and abroad too. Almost 100% of students get placed. A lot of students clear the USMLE exam from this college, and many of them get jobs after MBBS at good hospitals. There is always the option for private practice, and everyone's internship is done in the same hospital complex.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is a little old, so buildings are also old-fashioned, but facilities are up to the mark. There are both old and new hostels available, and the food quality in the mess is excellent. Two canteens are available on campus, and medical facilities are excellent too. It has sports grounds for football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, tennis, handball, and an indoor court for badminton. A swimming pool, gym, pool table, table tennis, and board games are also available at CISCO.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Great clinical practices.

review_content.Placements: It's a legit and awesome college that provides an awesome MBBS degree which helps us learn how to save lives of people. After completing the course, you can easily earn up to Rs. 90,000 as a medical officer in private practice, if you don't want to pursue a master's degree. .
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Classrooms are good and spacious with air conditioning and smart boards for excellent visual understanding of topics in depth. Also, the hostel is very good, with good quality and hygienic mess.

content.Placements: There are 250 students per batch in the 1st year of college. The internship amount is Rs 20,000 per month from this year. All the students who complete 4th year, and pass it are placed in an internship. You are eligible for NEET PG after you complete your internship.
content.Infrastructure: There are excellent facilities available in college with excellent Wi-Fi and air conditioning running in classrooms. There are lecture theatre, library, and labs. The quality of food available in mess is excellent. Canteen is also good. There are various game courts on campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Completing MBBS in GMC Amritsar is the best and fulfill your dreams.

content.Placements: I am in batch 2022 in the course MBBS. People undergoing those courses have enormous opportunities in college and after that as well. There is an internship after completing 4.5 years of the course, and we get a full hands-on experience of hospitals in every department.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are best and hostels are also well maintained. Food in the mess is of good quality and we have all the sports facilities. There are 4 boys hostels and 3 girls hostels. Each hostel has different mess. We can eat wherever we want. Every year, there is a sports tournament.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best medical college for new found freedom after NEET.

content.Placements: Im from batch 2022, MBBS placement in the medical field is less of a headache than other streams due to the doctor-per-patient ratio provided you opt for a PG degree. As an intern stipend is Rs. 15000, in PG and JRs get Rs. 60,000. It's one of the oldest and most reputed medical colleges in Punjab, having completed 100 years in 2020.
content.Infrastructure: Buildings need some development, the ones that are quite old but everything is available. We have Wi-Fi in hostel. Library is pretty nice. Hostels are pretty decent, now there's a new block built for boys which is much better so hostels would not be a problem. We have one the best grounds and sports, there's CISCO for indoor games and a well-made gymnasium. All the departments have good facilities, again I'll say they are a bit outdated but available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a really great college with good faculty, excellent sports infrastructure, and food quality.

content.Placements: It is a very old college, so it has a great alumni network in the country and abroad too. Almost 100% of students get placed. A lot of students clear the USMLE exam from this college, and many of them get jobs after MBBS at good hospitals. There is always the option for private practice, and everyone's internship is done in the same hospital complex.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is a little old, so buildings are also old-fashioned, but facilities are up to the mark. There are both old and new hostels available, and the food quality in the mess is excellent. Two canteens are available on campus, and medical facilities are excellent too. It has sports grounds for football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, tennis, handball, and an indoor court for badminton. A swimming pool, gym, pool table, table tennis, and board games are also available at CISCO.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Great clinical practices.

content.Placements: It's a legit and awesome college that provides an awesome MBBS degree which helps us learn how to save lives of people. After completing the course, you can easily earn up to Rs. 90,000 as a medical officer in private practice, if you don't want to pursue a master's degree. .
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Classrooms are good and spacious with air conditioning and smart boards for excellent visual understanding of topics in depth. Also, the hostel is very good, with good quality and hygienic mess.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Amritsar - A good option or not?
reviews.review_text: There are excellent facilities available in college with excellent Wi-Fi and air conditioning running in classrooms. There are lecture theatre, library, and labs. The quality of food available in mess is excellent. Canteen is also good. There are various game courts on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Completing MBBS in GMC Amritsar is the best and fulfill your dreams.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are best and hostels are also well maintained. Food in the mess is of good quality and we have all the sports facilities. There are 4 boys hostels and 3 girls hostels. Each hostel has different mess. We can eat wherever we want. Every year, there is a sports tournament.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college for new found freedom after NEET.
reviews.review_text: Buildings need some development, the ones that are quite old but everything is available. We have Wi-Fi in hostel. Library is pretty nice. Hostels are pretty decent, now there's a new block built for boys which is much better so hostels would not be a problem. We have one the best grounds and sports, there's CISCO for indoor games and a well-made gymnasium. All the departments have good facilities, again I'll say they are a bit outdated but available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a really great college with good faculty, excellent sports infrastructure, and food quality.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a little old, so buildings are also old-fashioned, but facilities are up to the mark. There are both old and new hostels available, and the food quality in the mess is excellent. Two canteens are available on campus, and medical facilities are excellent too. It has sports grounds for football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, tennis, handball, and an indoor court for badminton. A swimming pool, gym, pool table, table tennis, and board games are also available at CISCO.

reviews.review_heading: Great clinical practices.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are excellent. Classrooms are good and spacious with air conditioning and smart boards for excellent visual understanding of topics in depth. Also, the hostel is very good, with good quality and hygienic mess.

reviews.review_heading: GMC Amritsar MBBS journey.
reviews.review_text: We have a spacious library, labs, and lecture theatre. Hostel has all the necessities but the hygiene and sanitation are average. Hostels are very old and need to be repaired. College is 100 years old still some old things are not changed. Canteen and mess food are good here.

reviews.review_heading: All over, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text: Being a government college and hospital, the infrastructure is lacking. Although they have constructed two new hostels, one for girls (the smaller one) and another for boys, the overall condition of the college infrastructure is manageable but definitely needs improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Some true insights about GMC Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: Being a government college and hospital, the infrastructure part is lagging here. Although they have constructed 2 new hostels, one for girls (the smaller one) and the other for boys. But overall, the condition of college infrastructure is manageable. But it needs improvement, definitely.

reviews.review_heading: The oldest medical college in Punjab .
reviews.review_text: The quality of the food is on par but not the best. The infrastructure has been old since the college was established in the 1920s. The classrooms are up-to-date with the latest laboratory equipment and equipped with projectors and ACs. A state-of-the-art library and auditorium are built. Along with a swimming pool, gym, table tennis, cricket and football field. Hostels are both new and old. They are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus size with poor maintenance .
reviews.review_text:
Hostel facilities are quite average like the rooms are okayish. Girls hostel does not have single room facilities until you proceed senior batches. There is sheer lack of maintenance of the hostels. A new hostel is under construction. Hostel does not have Wi-Fi, geyser is available. Mess has average food.
Library has improper lighting and ventilation and no Wi-Fi plus lack of new books.
Lecture theatre anatomy Lt is air conditioned rest are not. 
Playgrounds are being upgraded. There is a sports...

reviews.review_heading: This is an average medical college.
reviews.review_text: The buildings are newly constructed i.e new boys hostel and a girls hostel. There is no air-conditioner in the girls' hostel, but they are poorly maintained. The boys' hostel is not kept properly with dogs roaming around. It also constructs a sports complex with a pool and gym, but the pool is very dirty. The food served in the canteen and mess is average. The laboratories and exam centers are newly constructed in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a student body center (pool, badminton court, table tennis, etc.) We also have a library and an auditorium. Other facilities like football ground, cricket ground, volleyball court, a Verka Booth, and a canteen are also available. There are around 6 hostels on the campus, and the food served is average.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, great campus and the finest faculty, but the infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average compared to other medical colleges. The college campus is beautiful and green. The infrastructure of our hostel is very bad. The classrooms are good. But now, new hostels are under construction for both boys and girls. The sports complex has recently been opened. Our college has a ground for basketball, volleyball and football, and they are well maintained now.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The building is 100 years old. The new building is very well built. The classrooms have adequate lighting and ventilation and are completely air-conditioned. The library has quite good lighting. There are separate rooms with AC for PG. The hostel is okay, with daily room cleaning and laundry service. Water filter system and geysers are present. You can even install AC in your rooms and can use any other electronic gadget. The canteen is student-cooperative. Medical facilities are available 24 ho...

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life, great college, facilities above average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in GMC is good. The College campus is beautiful with lots of greenery. The classrooms are good. The library is good and provides lots of old medical books with amazing texts. Hostel facilities are average. Canteens on the campus are good with good food quality. We have a sports complex which has recently been opened is still developing.
